verdict: T-016 isotropy-infimum core: F_0 Hessian block-diagonal in angular momentum; interaction curves only l=0 (Phi''_diag=(3/2)u_eff=4.028>0); l>=1 see entropy (1/2)G_*^-2>=4.637e-02>0. Isotropic dressing is a STRICT diagonal minimum, isotropy curvature-protected. Math427 core, conditional on H-diag; off-diagonal extension reduced (T-018) to exchange scalar b_exch (RES-5). No tier flip.

claims.name: breathing_l0_interaction_convex
claims.detail: (Phi''_diag = (3/2) u_eff = (3/2)(2.6850) = 4.0275 > 0: the l=0 isotropic-breathing sector, the ONLY sector the rotation-invariant interaction Phi_diag(M_tot) curves, is strictly convex via the sextic dressing of the attractive bare quartic u=-0.86)

claims.name: anisotropic_entropy_curvature_positive
claims.detail: (min_q (1/2)G_*^-2 = 4.6368e-02 > 0 on the grid: every anisotropic sector l>=1 sees ONLY this strictly-positive entropy Hessian, since the interaction is flat against l>=1 perturbations)

claims.name: entropy_infimum_analytic
claims.detail: (ANALYTIC infimum: (1/2)G_*^-2 = (1/2)[rR + c(q^2-q0^2)^2]^2 >= (1/2)rR^2 = 4.6368e-02, attained at the gap shell |q|=q0 where (q^2-q0^2)^2=0; the grid min 4.6368e-02 matches to <1e-3, confirming the entropy positivity is ANALYTIC (a square + rR^2>0), not numerical -- the l>=1 protection is theorem-grade)

claims.name: interaction_flat_against_anisotropy
claims.detail: (int Y_lm dOmega = 0 for l>=1 EXACTLY (orthogonality with Y_00); Gauss-Legendre (16 nodes, exact for the degree<=4 Legendre polynomials) gives max over (1,0),(2,0),(2,2),(3,0),(4,0) = 1.78e-15 (machine zero) => an l>=1 diagonal perturbation leaves M_tot=int G unchanged, so Phi_diag(M_tot) is FLAT against it and the anisotropic curvature is the entropy Hessian alone)

claims.name: strict_minimum_all_sectors
claims.detail: (min sector curvature = min over l of H_l = entropy floor 4.6368e-02 > 0 (l>=1), with the l=0 sector FURTHER raised by Phi''_diag=4.0275>0: the isotropic dressing is a STRICT diagonal minimum, isotropy protected by a positive curvature gap in every angular-momentum sector)

claims.name: quantitative_sanity_isotropy_mechanism
claims.detail: (mechanism: Phi_diag depends only on the ROTATION-INVARIANT M_tot=int G, so its Hessian acts only on l=0; signs: bare u=-0.86<0 lifted to u_eff=2.685>0 by sextic => Phi''_diag=4.028>0; entropy floor 4.637e-02>0; angular <Y_{l>=1}>=1.8e-15~0. Isotropy is curvature-protected, not fine-tuned)
